Student Life

Beyond Academics - Holistic Development

Vibrant Campus Life

At NLPS Badigachh High School, we believe in nurturing well-rounded individuals. Our diverse co-curricular activities provide students with opportunities to explore their interests, develop new skills, and build lasting friendships in a supportive environment.

Activities & Programs

Explore the wide range of opportunities available to our students

Sports & Athletics

Cricket, Football, Kabaddi, Athletics, and more. Regular practice sessions and inter-school competitions.

Highlights:

  • Annual Sports Day
  • District Level Competitions
  • Physical Education Classes

Cultural Activities

Music, dance, drama, and cultural programs celebrating various festivals and national days.

Highlights:

  • Annual Cultural Function
  • Independence Day Programs
  • Saraswati Puja Celebrations

Arts & Crafts

Drawing, painting, handicrafts, and creative expression through various art forms.

Highlights:

  • Art Competitions
  • Exhibition Events
  • Creative Workshops

Library & Reading

Well-stocked library with 612 books encouraging reading habits and knowledge expansion.

Highlights:

  • Reading Sessions
  • Book Week
  • Quiz Competitions

Clubs & Societies

Science Club, Literary Club, Environment Club fostering special interests and skills.

Highlights:

  • Science Exhibition
  • Debate Competitions
  • Nature Walks

Community Service

Social awareness programs, cleanliness drives, and community outreach activities.

Highlights:

  • Swachh Bharat Abhiyan
  • Tree Plantation
  • Health Awareness Camps

Mid-Day Meal Program

Our school provides nutritious mid-day meals to all students as part of the government's Mid-Day Meal Scheme. This program ensures that every child receives proper nutrition, which is essential for their growth, health, and ability to concentrate in class.

The meals are prepared with care, following hygiene standards, and include a balanced combination of proteins, carbohydrates, and vegetables.

Benefits

  • Improved nutrition and health
  • Better concentration in classes
  • Increased school attendance
  • Equal opportunities for all students

Annual Events

Celebrating learning, culture, and achievement throughout the year

August 15

Independence Day

Flag hoisting, cultural programs, and patriotic activities

January 26

Republic Day

Parade, speeches, and celebration of Indian constitution

February

Saraswati Puja

Traditional worship of Goddess of Learning with cultural programs

December

Annual Sports Day

Track and field events, team games, and prize distribution

January

Annual Function

Cultural performances, awards, and achievements celebration

November

Science Exhibition

Student projects, experiments, and scientific demonstrations

Student Achievements

Sports Excellence

  • • 3 Gold medals in District Sports Meet 2023
  • • 5 Silver medals in various athletic events
  • • Best School Award in Football Tournament
  • • State-level Kabaddi participation

Academic & Cultural

  • • First Prize at Block Level Science Exhibition
  • • Best Cultural Program Award 2023
  • • District Level Debate Competition Winners
  • • Multiple Essay Writing Competition Awards

Join Our Vibrant Community

Experience a well-rounded education that prepares you for success in academics, sports, arts, and life. Our supportive environment nurtures talent, builds confidence, and creates lasting memories.

NLPS Badigachh High School

Empowering rural education since 2006. Affiliated to WBCHSE, providing quality education from Class V to XII.
